intention: 参与这个项目；和这个项目有关
sentencePatterns: How many people are involved in ...?
I want to be involved in ...
He was involved in ... from the beginning.
realLifeExamples: How many people are involved in the project?
I want to be involved in projects that improve real learning.
usageNotes: be involved in 强调已经参与其中，或和某件事存在实际关联。说 project, process, discussion, decision 时都很常见。
productionPrompts: 用 How many people are involved in ...? 造一个和团队或项目有关的问题。
用 I want to be involved in ... because ... 造一句和你的学习或工作有关的句子。
